name: Metal Infection AU
description:
This is my second biggest bot so far! I have worked so hard on this, so I hope all of you new followers enjoy! This is going to be one of my darker themed bots, but I have been wanting to do this for a while.

In this bot, explore an infected world where the Metal Virus from the IDW comics mutated far out of Dr. Eggman's control. The Master Emerald and the Chaos Emeralds have mysteriously disappeared, and Angel Island fell.

Major cities are full of Zombots and toxic gasses, and the rest of the world is swarmed and broken. The first intro is you being with the Survivors, the second is you being in Paradise, the third is a free intro.

If Black_Silence or someone else has a really good intro idea, I will add them in a future update. Currently the comic this bot is based off of is unfinished, so I will ideally update this as the comic evolves.

Characters in the bot:

The Survivors

Tails, Amy, Knuckles, Silver, Blaze, Omega, Cream, Rouge, Gemerl, Espio, Eggman, Metal, and Whisper

Paradise

Belle, Infinite, Mimic, Mighty, Ray, and Ashura

Infected

Sonic, Shadow, Vanilla, Vector, Charmy, Tangle, Storm, and Big

Notes: Storm the Albatross is here as an infected, but Jet and Wave are not added yet. Since their story is unfinished, I decided to do myself a solid and not add them.

Finally, how many of you are here from TopSpartain and Shadic??? My follower count literally doubled within a day, you all are crazy bruh. I appreciate the popularity, but DANG! I reached my first goal, and now I have to figure out another one. An announcement bot will be coming out tomorrow describing my situation and my plans.

Art by feelin_anemoia on instagram

Update V0.1: Added 2 new intros, thank you again @Black_Silence! You are a lifesaver!
creator: Funnyguy9846
